description: Poetry in Arabic script. Recto is all one poem rhymed on -bī. There is an intriguing verse in which a speaker "swears by the Torah.... and Moses, and Isaac, and Jacob" (قفال اقسم بالتوراة مجتهدا . . . موسى واسحق ويعقوب). Verso contains verse from several different poems on different themes.
description_he: טקסט ספרותי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
